description_long: This is a sleek, modern airplane with a streamlined black fuselage and straight wings extending horizontally from the midsection. The wings are broad and feature subtle yellow tips, adding a touch of visibility and style. The tail section is compact, with a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer forming a conventional tail design. The engine appears to be integrated into the fuselage, with no visible external propellers or jet intakes, suggesting a possible electric or ducted fan configuration. The cockpit is smoothly blended into the forward section of the fuselage, with no visible canopy or windows, giving the airplane a minimalist and futuristic appearance. The landing gear is not visible, indicating it may be retractable or omitted in this model.
description: A sleek black airplane with straight mid-mounted wings, yellow-tipped wingtips, and a streamlined, windowless fuselage. The design is minimalist and modern, with a conventional tail and no visible landing gear.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, yellow-tipped wingtips, and the streamlined fuselage.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical wing placement, narrow fuselage, and the absence of visible cockpit windows or landing gear.
description_view_2: Bottom-up angled view revealing the underside of the wings and tail, with yellow tips visible on the trailing edges.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the overall symmetry of the airplane.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and slight dihedral; yellow-tipped wingtips; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single integrated engine, no visible propeller or jet intake, possibly electric or ducted fan.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, smoothly integrated cockpit with no visible windows or canopy.
